> Senior Product Designer & Complexity Architect with 13+ years transforming high-ambiguity enterprise systems into high-impact products.

- Status: Open to Work — seeking Senior or Staff Product Designer roles

## Core Strengths
- **Complexity Architecture**: Transforming fragmented, multi-decade enterprise systems into unified, intuitive products
- **Engineering Empathy**: Deep technical fluency — builds in code (Next.js, TypeScript, Framer Motion), speaks engineering language fluently
- **AI-Native Design**: Pioneering multi-agent AI workflows for design and development (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, Antigravity)
- **Vibe Coding**: High-fidelity interactive prototyping using code-first design methodology
- **Cross-functional Leadership**: Aligning 20+ person teams across design, engineering, product, and business stakeholders
- **Systems Thinking**: Mapping undocumented systems, identifying integration patterns, and driving architectural decisions

## Portfolio Highlights

### Interactive Brain Gears Experience
The portfolio itself features a custom interactive "Brain Gears" animation — 29 SVG gears that power up progressively as the user explores. This is not a template; it is a custom-built, code-first portfolio demonstrating technical craft and interactive storytelling.

### Case Study 1: ReportCaster — Enterprise Scheduler Modernization
- **URL**: https://www.anujaharsha.com/work/reportcaster/
- **Company**: Cloud Software Group (WebFOCUS)
- **Problem**: 40+ year-old enterprise scheduler losing customers. 5 fragmented subsystems, zero documentation, 20M+ weekly jobs at stake.
- **Solution**: Rebuilt 5 subsystems into 1 unified Hub architecture. Reduced schedule creation from 4 clicks to 2. Modal-based design leveraged existing platform patterns.
- **Impact**: Customers retained. Shipped April 2024. Powering 20M+ weekly schedules. Zero regressions.
- **Leadership**: Volunteered one week into the job. Mapped entire undocumented system solo. Navigated 2 rejected architectures. Aligned ~20-person cross-functional team.

### Case Study 2: ML Functions — Democratizing Machine Learning
- **URL**: https://www.anujaharsha.com/work/ml-functions/
- **Company**: Cloud Software Group (WebFOCUS)
- **Problem**: ML model training was engineer-only. Non-technical analysts couldn't leverage ML capabilities.
- **Solution**: Transformed engineer-driven workflow into guided, step-by-step experience using progressive disclosure and smart defaults.
- **Impact**: Made enterprise ML accessible to non-technical users without sacrificing power user capabilities.

### Case Study 3: DSML Discovery Hub — Data Science Adoption
- **URL**: https://www.anujaharsha.com/work/iq-plugin/
- **Company**: Cloud Software Group (WebFOCUS)
- **Problem**: NLQ, Insights, and ML capabilities were siloed and undiscoverable within the platform.
- **Solution**: Unified capabilities into one discoverable DSML Hub with progressive disclosure and multi-persona design.
- **Impact**: 25% adoption boost. Drove platform-wide data science feature discovery.

## Technical Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Animation**: Framer Motion
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + Custom Design Tokens
- **Hosting**: AWS (S3 + CloudFront)
- **AI Workflow**: ChatGPT (Strategy), Claude (Architecture), Gemini (Polish), Cursor (Build), Antigravity (Logic)

## Key Differentiators
1. **Custom-built portfolio** — not a template, demonstrating technical craft through the portfolio itself
2. **Interactive storytelling** — case studies presented as cinematic "movie beats" with narrated animations
3. **Brain Gears system** — 29 interactive SVG gears that respond to user exploration
4. **Code-first design** — high-fidelity prototypes built in code, not static mockups
5. **13+ years of enterprise complexity** — deep domain expertise in B2B systems at scale
